rows.label: Foreign Police
rows.english: Foreign Police (the official department for foreigners)

rows.label: Temporary res.
rows.english: Temporary residence — valid up to 5 years, renewable

rows.label: Permanent res.
rows.english: Permanent residence — applied for after 5 years of legal stay

rows.label: Revenue stamp
rows.english: Revenue stamp — mandatory fee (~€4.50) paid for official applications

rows.label: Passport
rows.english: Passport — your main ID document as a foreigner

rows.label: Lease agreement
rows.english: Rental / Lease agreement — proves your Slovak address (see Lesson 1!)

rows.label: Health insurance
rows.english: Health insurance — mandatory for residence applications

rows.label: Book appt.
rows.english: I would like to book an appointment.

rows.label: Submit app.
rows.english: Where do I submit my application?

rows.label: Apply for permit
rows.slovak: Chcem podať žiadosť o povolenie na pobyt.
rows.english: I want to submit a residence permit application.

rows.label: Take a number
rows.english: Please take a number (from the machine).

rows.label: Pay stamp fee
rows.english: Where do I pay the revenue stamp fee?

rows.label: Address
rows.english: Address — you know this from Lesson 1!

words.english: I would like to book an appointment.
Where do I submit my application?

scenarios.situation: The form has a field labelled 'Priezvisko'. What do you write?
scenarios.answerMeaning: Priezvisko = surname / family name. Meno = first name. A very common mix-up on Slovak forms — always double-check which is which!

scenarios.situation: You need to book an appointment at the Foreign Police. Which phrase do you use?
scenarios.answerMeaning: Chcem si rezervovať termín = I would like to book an appointment. Rezervovať = to reserve / book.

scenarios.situation: The receptionist says 'Prosím, vezmite si číslo.' What do you do?
choices: Take a numbered ticket from the machine
scenarios.answer: Take a numbered ticket from the machine
scenarios.answerMeaning: Vezmite si číslo = take a number. Slovak offices use numbered tickets — look for the machine at the vchod (entrance). Your number is called when it is your turn.

scenarios.situation: You need to prove you have a registered address in Slovakia. Which document do you bring?
scenarios.answerMeaning: Nájomná zmluva = rental / lease agreement. This proves your Slovak address — which is exactly what you learned to give in Lesson 1: Know Your Address!

scenarios.situation: Your residence permit allows you to stay up to 5 years and is renewable. What type is it?
scenarios.answerMeaning: Dočasný pobyt = temporary residence, valid up to 5 years and renewable. Trvalý pobyt = permanent residence, which you can apply for after 5 years of continuous legal stay.

scenarios.situation: The clerk asks 'Máte termín?' You booked one for Friday at ten. What do you answer?
choices: Môj termín je v piatok o desiatej.
scenarios.answer: Môj termín je v piatok o desiatej.
scenarios.answerMeaning: Môj termín je... = My appointment is... — v piatok = on Friday, o desiatej = at ten. The number desať (10) is from Stage 1, Lesson 5 — Numbers!

scenarios.situation: You need to pay a government fee for your residence permit application. What must you buy?
scenarios.answerMeaning: Kolok = revenue stamp — a mandatory fee (~€4.50) for many official applications in Slovakia. Buy it at the pošta (post office) or some banks before your appointment.

scenarios.situation: The form asks for 'Štátna príslušnosť'. What do you fill in?
scenarios.answerMeaning: Štátna príslušnosť = nationality / citizenship (štát = state, príslušnosť = belonging). Not to be confused with miesto narodenia (place of birth) or dátum narodenia (date of birth).

items.sentence: Chcem podať ___ o povolenie na pobyt.
items.translation: I want to submit a ___ for a residence permit.

items.sentence: Môj ___ je v piatok o desiatej.
items.translation: My ___ is on Friday at ten.
I will bring my ___, lease agreement and photo.

items.sentence: Kolok môžete kúpiť na ___ alebo v banke.
items.translation: You can buy the revenue stamp at the ___ or at the bank.

items.sentence: ___ na pobyt mi vyprší o tri mesiace.
items.translation: My residence ___ expires in three months.

exercises.scenario: 🏛️ You are at the Foreign Police office. The receptionist helps you book an appointment.

turns.snailMessage: Dobrý deň! Čím vám môžem pomôcť?
turns.snailMessageEnglish: Good day! How can I help you?

choices.slovak: Chcem podať žiadosť o povolenie na pobyt.
choices.english: I would like to submit a residence permit application.
What is your address?
Thank you, good day.

turns.snailReply: Rozumiem. Aký typ pobytu chcete — dočasný alebo trvalý?
turns.snailReplyEnglish: I understand. What type of residence do you want — temporary or permanent?

choices.english: I want temporary residence.
I want permanent residence.
I don't know what type I want.

turns.snailReplyEnglish: Good. Do you have an appointment?

choices.english: I don't have an appointment. I would like to book one.
My appointment is at ten.
I don't need an appointment.

turns.snailReply: Áno, samozrejme. Najbližší termín je v piatok o desiatej. Vyhovuje vám to?
turns.snailReplyEnglish: Yes, of course. The nearest appointment is Friday at ten. Does that suit you?

choices.slovak: Áno, v piatok o desiatej mi vyhovuje.
choices.english: Yes, Friday at ten suits me.
No, I can't on Friday.
I don't know when I can come.

turns.snailReplyEnglish: Excellent. What documents will you bring?

choices.slovak: Prinesiem pas, nájomná zmluva a potvrdenie o zamestnaní.
choices.english: I will bring my passport, lease agreement and proof of employment.
I will bring only my passport.
I have no documents.

turns.snailReply: Nezabudnite aj na fotografiu a zdravotné poistenie.
turns.snailReplyEnglish: Don't forget the photo and health insurance too.

choices.slovak: Ďakujem. Kde podám žiadosť v piatok?
choices.english: Thank you. Where do I submit the application on Friday?
I don't have health insurance.
Can I come without a photo?

turns.snailReply: Na prepážke číslo tri. Vezmite si číslo z automatu pri vchode.
turns.snailReplyEnglish: At counter number three. Take a number from the machine at the entrance.

choices.english: I understand. Where do I pay the revenue stamp fee?
Where is the toilet?
How much does the residence permit cost?

turns.snailReply: Kolok kúpite na pošte alebo v banke. Stojí 4,50 €.
turns.snailReplyEnglish: You can buy the revenue stamp at the post office or bank. It costs €4.50.

choices.english: Thank you very much. Goodbye!
I want to speak with the director.
Can you write that down for me?

turns.snailReply: Do videnia! Príďte v piatok o desiatej s dokladmi. Veľa šťastia!
turns.snailReplyEnglish: Goodbye! Come on Friday at ten with your documents. Good luck!

exercises.scenario: 🏛️ Teraz len po slovensky! Rezervujte si termín na cudzineckej polícii.

turns.snailMessage: Dobrý deň! Čím vám môžem pomôcť?

choices.slovak: Chcem podať žiadosť o povolenie na pobyt.

turns.snailReply: Rozumiem. Aký typ pobytu chcete — dočasný alebo trvalý?
Áno, samozrejme. Najbližší termín je v piatok o desiatej. Vyhovuje vám to?

choices.slovak: Áno, v piatok o desiatej mi vyhovuje.
Prinesiem pas, nájomná zmluva a potvrdenie o zamestnaní.

turns.snailReply: Nezabudnite aj na fotografiu a zdravotné poistenie.

choices.slovak: Ďakujem. Kde podám žiadosť v piatok?

turns.snailReply: Na prepážke číslo tri. Vezmite si číslo z automatu pri vchode.
Kolok kúpite na pošte alebo v banke. Stojí 4,50 €.
Do videnia! Príďte v piatok o desiatej s dokladmi. Veľa šťastia!
